title: The Cowboy Quarterback
writer: Fred Niblo Jr., Ring Lardner, George M. Cohan
actors: Bert Wheeler, Marie Wilson, Gloria Dickson
plot: Football scout for the Chicago Packers Rusty Walker signs Harry Lynn, a legendary broken-field runner. Harry won't leave his home town without his girlfriend Maizie Williams. He gets tangled up with gamblers and Rusty's girl Evely...
